name: Planck 2018 Cosmological Parameters
description: Planck 2018 results VI cosmological parameters — Table 2 ΛCDM and extended model constraints
notes: Reference values only; no raw data download required

name: Planck PR4 (NPIPE) Frequency Maps
description: NPIPE reprocessed frequency maps: 100/143/217/353 GHz (HFI polarization channels) + 70 GHz (LFI). Includes A/B detector splits for null tests. SEVEM and Commander CMB maps.
notes: Exact files: HFI_SkyMap_{freq}_2048_R4.00_full.fits for freq in {100,143,217,353}; HFI_SkyMap_{freq}_2048_R4.00_{A,B}.fits for splits; LFI_SkyMap_070_1024_R4.00_full.fits; common_mask_*.fits

name: Planck PR4 EB Published Results
description: Published β values from Eskilt (2022) and Zagatti+(2025) PR4 map-space analysis

name: BBN Light Element Abundances — 2024 Update
description: Burns+(2024): ΔNeff = -0.10 ± 0.21 from light elements alone; Ωbh² = 0.02218 ± 0.00055
notes: Conservative marginalization over nuclear rates via PRyMordial code

name: Galaxy Zoo DECaLS Labels
description: Galaxy Zoo volunteer classifications for DECaLS galaxies. ~314k galaxies with morphology votes including spiral winding direction (CW/CCW).

name: SDSS Imaging Cutouts
description: SDSS galaxy image cutouts (128×128 RGB JPEG) via SkyServer REST API
notes: Rate-limited to 2 req/sec; failures logged to download_failures.csv

name: BigBounce Paper 1 MCMC Posteriors
description: Posterior chains from Paper 1 canonical MCMC runs (CPU#1 pod). Parameters: H0/ΔNeff/Ωm/Ωbh²/ns/τ/σ₈. Not yet converged as of 2026-03-05.
storage_path: NOT distributed; local copy only after convergence
notes: INTERNAL ONLY. Do NOT reference as public dataset. Chains still running on CPU#1 pod m4xpnxzgokd93f. Will be available after freeze_check passes. Access: scp from RunPod.

name: Galaxy Spin Asymmetry Counts
description: CW/CCW galaxy counts reconstructed from published tables in Shamir (2024 JWST JADES). Not a downloadable catalog — values extracted from paper Tables 1-3.
notes: METHOD: Manual extraction from published tables. Columns: survey, N_CW, N_CCW, N_total, A_obs, sigma_A, sky_region. See data file header for exact table references.

name: CMB Birefringence β — Minami & Komatsu
description: β = 0.35° ± 0.14° (68% CL) from Planck 2018 HFI EB cross-correlation
notes: First >2σ detection of isotropic cosmic birefringence

name: CMB Birefringence β — Eskilt PR4
description: Frequency-dependent β from Planck PR4: β = 0.30° ± 0.11° (68% CL). Checks frequency dependence to separate from Galactic dust EB.

name: CMB Birefringence β — ACT DR6
description: ACT DR6 birefringence: β = 0.215° ± 0.074° (2.9σ). Independent of Planck systematics.

name: SPIDER+Planck+ACT Combined β
description: Combined SPIDER+Planck+ACT: 7σ detection of cosmic birefringence
